package.sql: SELECT mwl_key AS MWL_KEY, CASE WHEN scheduled_proc_status = '0' THEN 'CA' -- cancel order WHEN scheduled_proc_status IN ('100', '120') THEN 'NW' -- new order (Ordered or Scheduled) END AS ORDER_CONTROL_ID, RTRIM(event_type) AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(RTRIM(character_set), 1, 32) AS CHARACTER_SET, SUBSTR(NVL(RTRIM(scheduled_aetitle), 'null'), 1, 16) AS SCHEDULED_AETITLE, SUBSTR(NVL(RTRIM(scheduled_dttm), RTRIM(imaging_request_dttm)), 1, 14) AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_modality), 1, 8) AS SCHEDULED_MODALITY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_station), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_STATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_location), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_id), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_desc), 1, 64) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_DESC, CASE WHEN scheduled_action_codes IS null THEN NVL(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_id), 'null') ELSE SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(RTRIM(scheduled_action_codes), ':', 1), 1, 32) END AS SCHEDULED_ACTION_CODES, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_status), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_STATUS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(premedication), 1, 32) AS PREMEDICATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(contrast_agent), 1, 32) AS CONTRAST_AGENT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_id), 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_desc), 1, 64) AS REQUESTED_PROC_DESC, CASE WHEN requested_proc_codes IS null THEN NVL(RTRIM(requested_proc_id), 'null') ELSE SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(RTRIM(requested_proc_codes), ':', 1), 1, 32) END AS REQUESTED_PROC_CODES, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_priority), 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_PRIORITY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_reason), 1, 256) AS REQUESTED_PROC_REASON, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_comments), 1, 4000) AS REQUESTED_PROC_COMMENTS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(study_instance_uid), 1, 64) AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(proc_placer_order_no), 1, 32) AS PROC_PLACER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(proc_filler_order_no), 1, 32) AS PROC_FILLER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(accession_no), 1, 32) AS ACCESSION_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(attend_doctor), 1, 32) AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(perform_doctor), 1, 32) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(consult_doctor), 1, 32) AS CONSULT_DOCTOR, NVL(NVL(SUBSTR(RTRIM(request_doctor), 1, 32), RTRIM(attend_doctor)), 'null') AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(refer_doctor), 1, 32) AS REFER_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(request_department), 1, 32) AS REQUEST_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(imaging_request_reason), 1, 256) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_REASON, SUBSTR(RTRIM(imaging_request_comments), 1, 4000) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_COMMENTS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(imaging_request_dttm), 1, 14) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(isr_placer_order_no), 1, 32) AS ISR_PLACER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(isr_filler_order_no), 1, 32) AS ISR_FILLER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(admission_id), 1, 32) AS ADMISSION_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_transport), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_TRANSPORT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_location), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_residency), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_name), 1, 64) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_id), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(other_patient_name), 1, 64) AS OTHER_PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(RTRIM(other_patient_id), 1, 32) AS OTHER_PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_birth_date), 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DATE, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_sex), 1, 3) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_weight), 1, 16) AS PATIENT_WEIGHT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_size), 1, 16) AS PATIENT_SIZE, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_state), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_STATE, 'Y' AS CONFIDENTIALITY, --NVL(SUBSTR(confidentiality, 1, 256), 'Y'), SUBSTR(RTRIM(pregnancy_status), 1, 256) AS PREGNANCY_STATUS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(medical_alerts), 1, 256) AS MEDICAL_ALERTS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(contrast_allergies), 1, 256) AS CONTRAST_ALLERGIES, SUBSTR(RTRIM(special_needs), 1, 32) AS SPECIAL_NEEDS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(specialty), 1, 32) AS SPECIALTY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(diagnosis), 1, 2048) AS DIAGNOSIS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(admit_dttm), 1, 14) AS ADMIT_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(register_dttm), 1, 14) AS REGISTER_DTTM --SUBSTR(RTRIM(study_ssn), 1, 64) AS STUDY_SSN, --SUBSTR(RTRIM(insurance_code), 1, 64) AS INSURANCE_CODE, --SUBSTR(RTRIM(emergency), 1, 8) AS EMERGENCY, --SUBSTR(RTRIM(special_doctor), 1, 32) AS SPECIAL_DOCTOR FROM mwlWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE mwlwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE mwl_key = #MWL_KEY

SELECT patientwl_key AS PATIENTWL_KEY, RTRIM(event_type) AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(patient_id, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_name, 1, 64) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(english_name, 1, 32) AS ENGLISH_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ssn, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SSN, SUBSTR(patient_birth_dttm, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, SUBSTR(patient_sex, 1, 3) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(patient_weight, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_WEIGHT, SUBSTR(patient_size, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_SIZE, SUBSTR(ethnic_group, 1, 32) AS ETHNIC_GROUP, SUBSTR(tel_no, 1, 32) AS TEL_NO, SUBSTR(fax_no, 1, 32) AS FAX_NO, SUBSTR(zipcode, 1, 16) AS ZIPCODE, SUBSTR(address, 1, 128) AS ADDRESS, SUBSTR(email, 1, 64) AS EMAIL, SUBSTR(blood_type, 1, 8) AS BLOOD_TYPE, SUBSTR(pregnancy_status, 1, 3) AS PREGNANCY_STATUS, SUBSTR(current_location, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(current_residency, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(current_department, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(current_doctor_id, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_ID, SUBSTR(current_doctor_name, 1, 64) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_NAME, SUBSTR(admit_dttm, 1, 14) AS ADMIT_DTTM, SUBSTR(discharge_dttm, 1, 14) AS DISCHARGE_DTTM FROM patientWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE patientwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE patientwl_key = #PATIENTWL_KEY

SELECT REPORTWL_KEY, exam_id AS EXAM_ID, patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, NVL(report_stat, 'F') AS REPORT_STAT, creator_id AS CREATOR_ID, creator_name AS CREATOR_NAME, create_dttm AS CREATE_DTTM, dictator_id AS DICTATOR_ID, dictator_name AS DICTATOR_NAME, dictate_dttm AS DICTATE_DTTM, transcriber_id AS TRANSCRIBER_ID, transcriber_name AS TRANSCRIBER_NAME, transcribe_dttm AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, approver_id AS APPROVER_ID, approver_name AS APPROVER_NAME, approve_dttm AS APPROVE_DTTM, reviser_id AS REVISER_ID, reviser_name AS REVISER_NAME, revise_dttm AS REVISE_DTTM, report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, report_text AS REPORT_TEXT, conclusion AS CONCLUSION FROM reportWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE reportwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE reportwl_key = #REPORTWL_KEY

SELECT user_key AS USER_KEY, SUBSTR(user_id, 1, 16) AS USER_ID, SUBSTR(user_name, 1, 64) AS USER_NAME, SUBSTR(password, 1, 128) AS PASSWORD, SUBSTR(user_level, 1, 16) AS USER_LEVEL, SUBSTR(user_status, 1, 16) AS USER_STATUS, comments AS COMMENTS FROM userWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE userwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE user_key = #USER_KEY

SELECT orm_key AS ORM_KEY, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(scheduled_date_time, 1, 14) AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, SUBSTR(diagnostic_serv_sect_id, 1, 8) AS SCHEDULED_MODALITY, SUBSTR(filler_field2, 1, 32) AS FILLER_FIELD2, SUBSTR(orm_field2, 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, SUBSTR(filler_field1, 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_ID, SUBSTR(specimen_source, 1, 64) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_DESC, SUBSTR(universal_service_id, 1, 256) AS SCHEDULED_ACTION_CODES, order_control_id AS ORDER_CONTROL_ID, CASE WHEN order_control_id = 'CA' THEN '0' ELSE '120' END AS SCHEDULED_PROC_STATUS, SUBSTR(placer_field2, 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_ID, sp_util.parse_string(universal_service_id, '^', 1) AS REQUESTED_PROC_CODES, sp_util.parse_string(universal_service_id, '^', 2) AS REQUESTED_PROC_DESC, SUBSTR(quantity_timing, 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_PRIORITY, reason_for_study AS REQUESTED_PROC_COMMENTS, SUBSTR(reference_pointer, 1, 64) AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, SUBSTR(placer_field1, 1, 32) AS ACCESSION_NO, SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(consulting_doctor_name, '^', 2), 1, 32) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, NVL(sp_util.parse_string(orm_field2, '^', 2), 'IHE_Doc') AS REFER_DOCTOR, NVL(SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(attending_doctor_name, '^', 2), 1, 32) , NVL(sp_util.parse_string(orm_field2, '^', 2), 'IHE_Doc')) AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(NVL(prior_patient_location, 'IHE'), 1, 32) AS REQUEST_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(request_dttm, 1, 14) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_DTTM, SUBSTR(orm_field1, 1, 32) AS ADMISSION_ID, SUBSTR(patient_class, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(patient_residency, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(patient_name, 1, 64) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_id, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_ename, 1, 64) AS OTHER_PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ssn, 1, 32) AS OTHER_PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_birth_dttm, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DATE, SUBSTR(patient_sex, 1, 1) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(specialty, 1, 32) AS SPECIALTY, diagnosis AS DIAGNOSIS, null AS CONFIDENTIALITY, null AS CONSULT_DOCTOR, null AS PROC_FILLER_ORDER_NO, null AS PROC_PLACER_ORDER_NO, null AS IMAGING_REQUEST_REASON, null AS IMAGING_REQUEST_COMMENTS, null AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, null AS REQUESTED_PROC_REASON, 'AE' AS SCHEDULED_AETITLE FROM ormQueue WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE ormqueue SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE orm_key = #ORM_KEY

SELECT SUBSTR(event_type, 1, 32) AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(patient_account_no, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ACCOUNT_NO, SUBSTR(patient_id, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(prior_patient_id, 1, 64) AS PRIOR_PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_name, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ename, 1, 32) AS ENGLISH_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ssn, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SSN, SUBSTR(patient_birth_dttm, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, SUBSTR(patient_sex, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(patient_weight, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_WEIGHT, SUBSTR(patient_size, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SIZE, SUBSTR(patient_ethnic_group, 1, 32) AS ETHNIC_GROUP, SUBSTR(patient_phone_no, 1, 32) AS TEL_NO, SUBSTR(patient_fax_no, 1, 32) AS FAX_NO, SUBSTR(patient_zipcode, 1, 32) AS ZIPCODE, SUBSTR(patient_address, 1, 32) AS ADDRESS, SUBSTR(patient_email, 1, 32) AS EMAIL, SUBSTR(patient_blood_type, 1, 32) AS BLOOD_TYPE, SUBSTR(patient_pregnancy_status, 1, 32) AS PREGNANCY_STATUS, SUBSTR(patient_class, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(patient_location, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(prior_patient_location, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(current_doctor_id, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_ID, SUBSTR(current_doctor_name, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_NAME, null AS ADMIT_DTTM, null AS DISCHARGE_DTTM, SUBSTR(adt_field1, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD1, SUBSTR(adt_field2, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD2, SUBSTR(adt_field3, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD3, SUBSTR(adt_field4, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD4, SUBSTR(adt_field5, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD5, SUBSTR(adt_field6, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD6, SUBSTR(adt_field7, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD7, SUBSTR(adt_field8, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD8, SUBSTR(adt_field9, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD9, SUBSTR(adt_field10, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD10 FROM adtQueue WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE adtqueue SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE adt_key = #ADT_KEY

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.match_stat AS MATCH_STAT, p.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, to_char(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, st.station_name AS STATION_NAME, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, m.sps_location AS SPS_LOCATION, to_char(m.sps_start_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SPS_START_DTTM, v.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, to_char(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.study_desc AS STUDY_DESC, s.bodyparts AS BODYPARTS, m.sps_stat AS SPS_STAT, m.sps_id AS SPS_ID, m.sps_comments AS SPS_COMMENTS, p.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, p.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, v.visit_no AS VISIT_NO, NVL(s.series_count, 0) AS SERIES_COUNT, NVL(s.instance_count, 0) AS INSTANCE_COUNT FROM study s, msps m, patient p, iOrder i, visit v, station st, (SELECT routeitem_key, object_key, match_stat FROM (SELECT /*+ rule */ i.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, i.object_key AS OBJECT_KEY, CASE WHEN s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.order_key IS NOT NULL AND s.series_count > 0 AND s.instance_count > 0 THEN 'M' ELSE 'U' END AS MATCH_STAT FROM hl7routeItem i, hl7station st, study s, iOrder o WHERE i.dst_station_key = st.station_key AND i.route_stat = 'N' AND i.message_type = 'ORM' AND i.EVENT_TYPE IN ('CM', 'MP', 'UM', 'SC', 'CA') AND i.object_key = s.study_key(+) AND s.order_key = o.order_key(+) ORDER BY i.trigger_dttm ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE q.match_stat = 'M' AND s.study_key = q.object_key AND m.study_key = s.study_key AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id AND s.order_key = i.order_key AND p.patient_key = i.patient_key AND i.visit_key = v.visit_key(+) AND m.station_key = st.station_key AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL

SELECT p.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, i.filler_order_id AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, s.request_department AS DEPARTMENT, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, st.station_name AS STATION_NAME, m.sps_location AS SPS_LOCATION, to_char(m.sps_start_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SPS_START_DTTM, v.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, to_char(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, m.sps_stat AS SPS_STAT, m.sps_id AS SPS_ID, m.sps_comments AS SPS_COMMENTS, p.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, p.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, v.visit_no AS VISIT_NO FROM study s, msps m, patient p, iOrder i, visit v, station st, (SELECT routeitem_key, study_instance_uid, match_stat FROM (SELECT /*+ rule */ i.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, CASE WHEN s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.order_key IS NOT NULL AND s.series_count > 0 AND s.instance_count > 0 THEN 'M' ELSE 'U' END AS MATCH_STAT FROM hl7routeItem i, hl7station st, study s, iOrder o WHERE i.dst_station_key = st.station_key AND i.route_stat = 'N' AND i.message_type = 'ORM' AND i.EVENT_TYPE IN ('CM', 'MP', 'UM', 'SC', 'CA') AND s.order_key = o.order_key(+) ORDER BY i.trigger_dttm ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE q.match_stat = 'U' AND s.study_instance_uid = q.study_instance_uid AND m.study_key = s.study_key AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id AND s.order_key = i.order_key AND p.patient_key = i.patient_key AND i.visit_key = v.visit_key(+) AND m.station_key = st.station_key
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = 'Y', replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = CASE WHEN NVL(retry_count, 0) >= 2 THEN 'E' ELSE 'N' END, retry_count = NVL(retry_count, 0) + 1, replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS ADDENDUM_STAT, c.userid AS CREATE_USERID, c.user_name AS CREATE_USERNAME, to_char(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATE_USERID, d.user_name AS DICTATE_USERNAME, to_char(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBE_USERID, t.user_name AS TRANCRIBE_USERNAME, to_char(r.transcribe_dttm,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVE_USERID, a.user_name AS APPROVE_USERNAME, to_char(r.approval_dttm,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVE_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISE_USERID, v.user_name AS REVISE_USERNAME, to_char(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISE_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, NVL(DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(r.report_text_lob), 0) AS REPORT_TEXT, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, to_char(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.institution AS INSTITUTION, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, to_char(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, to_char(m.sps_start_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SPS_START_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, to_char(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.study_id AS SPS_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, s.operators AS OPERATORS, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.source_aetitle AS AETITLE, r.alink_key AS ALINK_KEY, m.sps_location AS SPS_LOCATION -- r.digital_sign_flag AS DIGITAL_SIGN_FLAG, -- r.digital_sign_data AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DATA, -- r.digital_sign_dttm AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DTTM, -- r.certificate_dn AS CERTIFICATE_DN, -- r.digital_sign_key AS DIGITAL_SIGN_KEY FROM report r, study s, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, msps m, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type in ('R', 'A') AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE r.report_key IN q.object_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND r.study_key = m.study_key AND s.study_stat > 200 AND r.creator_key = c.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = a.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+)
SELECT 1 AS ONE FROM DUAL
SELECT 1 AS ONE FROM DUAL

SELECT se.svc_cd AS SVC_CD, se.inu_cd AS INU_CD, i.inu_nm AS INU_NM, se.faclt_cd AS FACLT_CD, f.faclt_nm AS FACLT_NM, se.sys_cd AS SYS_CD, sy.sys_nm AS SYS_NM FROM instMst i, facilityMst f, sysMst sy, service se WHERE se.inu_cd = i.inu_cd AND se.faclt_cd = f.faclt_cd AND se.sys_cd = sy.sys_cd AND se.act_stat = 'V' AND se.faclt_cd = sy.faclt_cd ORDER BY se.svc_cd ASC
SELECT cntt_catg_key, cntt_catg_nm FROM contentCatg WHERE inu_cd = @INSTITUTION_CODE AND faclt_cd = @FACILITY_CODE AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT cntt_catg_typ_key, cntt_catg_typ_nm FROM contentType WHERE cntt_catg_key = @CNTT_CATG_KEY AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT mime_typ_grp_key, mime_typ_grp_nm FROM mimeTypeGroup ORDER BY mime_typ_grp_nm ASC
SELECT mime_typ_key, mime_file_ex, mime_typ, mime_desc FROM mimeType WHERE mime_typ_grp_key = @MIME_TYP_GRP_KEY ORDER BY mime_file_ex ASC
SELECT inter_http FROM stationMst WHERE svc_cd = @SERVICE_CODE AND prod_key = (SELECT prod_key FROM productMst WHERE prod_nm = 'CONTENTUPLOADER') AND use_yn = 'Y' AND rownum = 1
SELECT p.pf_val AS PF_VAL FROM sysProfileMst pm, sysProfile p WHERE pm.pf_key = p.pf_key AND pm.pf_sec = 'SECURITY' AND pm.pf_entry = 'AUTHORIZATION_SERVER_HTTP_BASE_URL' AND pm.pf_lv = 'IHP'
